notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. José Ramírez out at 2nd. Rhys Hoskins out at 1st.
